name: RS232Receive
title: RS232Receive
syntax: dword RS232Receive( dword port, byte buffer[], dword size )
description: Receive blocks of bytes from a serial port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: A number between 1 and 255 identifying a serial port.

return:
0: error
The error occurs if
An error is only given if a problem is issued directly by the system.
To get informed about errors occurring in later stages of the operation use RS232OnError.
